articles.title: Xi Jinping Was Only Humoring Trump
articles.why: The Atlantic's framing of the Beijing summit — Xi humoring Trump while the U.S. shows up with tech billionaires instead of diplomats — is the sharpest geopolitical read of the week, cutting through the noise of trade deal optimism.
articles.hook: Trump brought Musk and Tim Cook to Beijing. / Xi brought patience. / Only one of them needed the meeting.
